resources.string: Screen is mirrored with a CRT filter. Tap to open settings or stop from the app.
Allow "Display over other apps" first — opening settings…
Screen capture was not granted. CRT filtering needs it to process the picture.

This app captures the screen at full resolution, then draws it through a GPU CRT filter using a low emulated pixel grid (default min 512×384, extended to fill your display aspect).

Effects: soft phosphor blend, scanlines, subtle RGB mask, bloom, vignette, and optional curvature. Defaults aim for a bright, natural picture; increase RGB mask or scanlines in settings for a harsher look.

1) Allow "Display over other apps". 2) Set emulated width × height. 3) Tap Start — allow screen capture.

Touch is not reliable while the overlay is on; use a gamepad or stop the overlay.

On Xiaomi / Poco (HyperOS): if the overlay list is empty, use "Open app info", then Other permissions → Display over other apps.
